subcodes.first_line: O thou who art present before the Throne and gazest upon the Countenance! We were communing with all things in the Prison of 'Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الحاضر لدی العرش و الناظر الی الوجه کنا نحدث مع الاشیاء فی سجن عکاء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @symbolism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
